rulings.Case Title: PARKFRONT INVESTMENTS LLC VS. KOKKARI LTD.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 11, 2026. Line 1. RESPONDENT KOKKARI LTD. , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees is GRANTED. Respondent is the prevailing party entitled to recovery of reasonable attorney's fees under the Lease in the amount of $51,063 for reasonable hours at reasonable rates. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JISOO YOO ET AL VS. POST-MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNAIA GENERAL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Stipulated Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 11, 2026. Line 4. DEFENDANT POST-MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNAIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Stipulated Protective Order is DENIED. Discovery in this action is subject to previously granted stipulated protective order. Moving party fails to meet its burden to show that the protective order they have previously stipulated to in now inadequate to protect privacy interests. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SFII 1390 MARKET STREET LLC VS. ABDUL RASHEED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 11, 2026. Line 9. DEFENDANT SARRA ZAATOUT DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. The Notice to Pay Rent or Quit indicates that payment may be made personally, but fails to comply with CCP 1161(2) express requirements in the event this option is provided. This defect cannot be cured by amending the Complaint. This matter will be heard in department 505 by the Honorable Michelle Tong at 1:30 p.m. per the order of the presiding judge. =(505/MT) Parties may appear in-person, or via Zoom Video Conference (Meeting ID: 160 4132 4666 Passcode: 872834). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Case Title: CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE, INC. VS. LUCA KRAKOWER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Discovery Requests; And, For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 11, 2026. Line 11. PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE, INC. Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Discovery Requests; And, For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED as to Defendant Luca Krakower only, subject to opposition, and DENIED as to Defendant Kevin Krakower. No proof that the discovery was served to Defendant Kevin Krakower at his address of record. Defendant Luca Krakower is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer (Set One); Special Interrogatories (Set One); and Request for Production of Documents (Set One) directed to him, within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted against Defendant Luca Krakower in the amount of $585. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
